statement: In every magma, Equation 1321 (`x = y * (((y * x) * z) * w)`) implies Equation 2805 (`x = ((y * z) * (z * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0342
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op y x) z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op z x)) y)
